topics.name: Adaptation in Animals
learning_objectives: Define adaptation and explain why animals adapt
Give examples of camouflage (chameleon, stick insect)
Explain hibernation (bear, frog) and migration (birds)
Describe adaptations for desert (camel) and polar (polar bear) environments

topics.name: Plants – Adaptation and Reproduction
learning_objectives: Explain how plants adapt to different environments (cactus, water lily, pine)
Describe methods of seed dispersal: wind, water, animals, explosion
Identify parts of a flower and their roles in reproduction

topics.name: Food – Nutrients and Balanced Diet
learning_objectives: Name the main nutrients: carbohydrates, proteins, fats, vitamins, minerals, water
Identify food sources for each nutrient
Describe a balanced diet
Name common deficiency diseases (scurvy, rickets, anaemia)

topics.name: Our Environment – Pollution
learning_objectives: Define air, water and soil pollution
Identify major causes of pollution
Explain effects of pollution on living things
Suggest ways to reduce pollution (3 Rs)

topics.name: Force and Motion
learning_objectives: Define force as a push or a pull
Identify types of force: muscular, gravitational, magnetic, frictional
Explain effects of friction (advantages and disadvantages)
Describe how gravity acts on objects

topics.name: Water – The Water Cycle
learning_objectives: Describe the stages of the water cycle: evaporation, condensation, precipitation
Explain cloud formation
Discuss the importance of water conservation

topics.name: Our State and India – Geography Basics
learning_objectives: Identify major states and union territories on a map
Name major rivers and mountain ranges of India
Describe climate zones in India (tropical, temperate, cold)
worksheet_types: fill in the blanks on geography
